sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43435" key="eu)apo/niptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐαπό-νιπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43435.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to wash off</tr_>, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg001:p.204" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.204</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
